svg.title: Strict cache lineage with borrowed-idea edges and the technique branch
svg.desc: Solid edges mark structural descent, dashed edges mark borrowed ideas. LRU roots the CLOCK/recency branch and the FIFO/queue branch; a log-structured store roots the segment branch to Segcache and GL-Cache; BP-Wrapper roots a technique branch to Caffeine. Segcache borrows three ideas: FIFO-plus-probation from 2Q, the frequency-bit reinsertion from the CLOCK line, and amortized bookkeeping from the technique branch. S3-FIFO borrows reinsertion plus a counter from CLOCK.
